title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies!
